inputs.label: Value 1
inputs.businessContext: Data point value for statistical calculation (e.g., measurement, score, quantity)

businessContext_i18n.en: Data point value for statistical calculation (e.g., measurement, score, quantity)
businessContext_i18n.tr: İstatistiksel hesaplama için veri noktası değeri (ör. ölçüm, puan, miktar)
businessContext_i18n.de: Datenpunktwert für statistische Berechnung (z. B. Messung, Punktzahl, Menge)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur du point de données pour le calcul statistique (p. ex., mesure, score, quantité)
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor del punto de datos para cálculo estadístico (p. ej., medición, puntuación, cantidad)

formulas.mean: (value1 + value2 + value3 + value4 + value5 + value6 + value7 + value8) / 8
formulas.mean_aux: (value1 + value2 + value3 + value4 + value5 + value6 + value7 + value8) / 8

breakdown: Mean (average) is the sum of all values divided by the count (8).
Median is the middle value: for 8 numbers, it is the average of the 4th and 5th sorted values.
Mode is the most frequently occurring value(s).
suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
